description: Firefox cache parser (best-effort) walks cache2/entries, extracts URLs from metadata sections
steps: For each file: read all bytes, if < 4 bytes skip
Read last 4 bytes as big-endian u32 = metadata_offset from start of file
Read bytes [metadata_offset .. file_len - 4] as metadata section
Scan metadata bytes for first occurrence of 'http' as UTF-8 substring
Extract URL: from that position to next null byte or newline or end of metadata
If valid URL found, emit event
Timestamp: 0. Set browser = BrowserFamily::Firefox, artifact = ArtifactKind::Cache
Test factory: create TempDir, write hand-crafted binary file with URL in metadata section followed by big-endian metadata offset as last 4 bytes
Test: parse_ff_cache_extracts_url — crafted file yields event with attrs[url] containing 'http'
